arts.ttl: Brighton man details previous Atletico Madrid interest – Still keeping a close eye on former club
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion midfielder Mats Wieffer has admitted he was on Atletico Madrid’s radar in the past, but nothing concrete came of it. 1908.nl cover comments from the Brighton midfielder today in which he also admits he’s keeping a close eye on former club Feyenoord from the south coast. arts.ttl: Diego Simeone singles one Barcelona star out for special praise before La Liga showdown
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid head coach Diego Simeone has today moved to reveal his appreciation for a leading member of the attacking ranks at Barcelona. The player in question? Raphinha. Wide-man Raphinha,…

arts.ttl: Flick talks Yamal, Lewandowski, Barça’s form and Atlético
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick spoke to the press on Friday ahead of Saturday’s monster La Liga clash against Atlético Madrid, with the winner going into the holiday break at the top of the table and earning huge momentum ahead of the second half of the season. Now they have to face a scorching hot Atlético side that has won 11 games in a row in all competitions, and Diego Simeone’s side will look to take advantage of Barça’s dip in form and move into first place.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star ‘open to hearing’ offer from Barcelona
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich remains interested in a potential future move to La Liga giants Barcelona. That’s according to German football insider Christian Falk, who has on Friday provided…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star absent from training on eve of Atlético clash
arts.sum: A member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona played no part in team training alongside the rest of Hansi Flick’s squad on Friday. The player in question?…

arts.ttl: Diego Simeone insists Atlético Madrid’s title hopes will not depend on crucial Barcelona clash
arts.sum: “What we have been talking about for a month and a half, the team is working well as a unit, looking for the place in every game to hurt the opponent to compete and improve and we are going to face a team that plays very well, I like their youth in midfield, where they play very good football, Raphinha is one of the best in La Liga for behaviour, bravery and way of playing and we have our strengths for a game that will surely be entertaining.” “He’s an extraordinary player, he’s growing enormously, he’s one of the best in attack and Barcelona don’t have similar characteristics to him, but they have Ferrán, Olmo, Fermín to play looking for another way for what they are interested in.”

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick speaks out on Barcelona’s plans to cover for Lamine Yamal absence vs Atlético
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has admitted that he and his staff are yet to come to a final decision on the plan to replace Lamine Yamal in the club’s…

arts.ttl: 'How have Barca let him go?' Meet Chelsea's 18-year-old future 'star'
arts.sum: Marc Guiu, 18, could be a "big star" for Chelsea after scoring a hat-trick against Shamrock Rovers in the Conference League.

arts.ttl: Official: Barcelona star ‘declared fit’ for Atlético clash
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have on Friday announced some altogether positive news in the club’s first-team ranks. This comes amid confirmation that Ansu Fati has been cleared to mark his…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick responds to criticism over Robert Lewandowski and changes –
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick has explained that his side needed to clear their mind this week, after losing to Leganes last Sunday. Generally managers tend to reward their players with days off after wins, but Flick allowed his side two days off this week anyway.
